title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Shoes Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Shoes Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Metro Shoes Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Metro Shoes Advisory Limited:
Metro Shoes Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes Advisory Limited!
